response.justification: Candidate has only ~6 months of C++ experience (National Instruments, 2014-2015) over a 15+ year career dominated by JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle work, no Windows-platform focus, and no capital markets, investment banking, or fixed-income domain exposure. The role requires 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows plus financial-services context — none of the mandatory or domain criteria are met.
strengths: Strong software-craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Excellent communication evidenced by workshops, talks, and courses
Broad polyglot experience including systems-level work in DLang and some C/C++
concerns: Only ~6 months of C++ experience, well below the 5-10 year requirement
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; databases used are MongoDB/MySQL
Zero exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
